rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §38.102, which governs adoption of student physical fitness assessment instruments by the commissioner.
quote: The commissioner by rule shall adopt an assessment instrument to be used by a school district in assessing student physical fitness under this subchapter.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and this rule; rule concerns physical fitness assessments, not property tax exemptions.
